name: cadence
description: Binary-assertion suite for /ren:cadence — the cadence router. Asserts correct tier routing + convention attachment.

tests.prompt: /ren:cadence I want a daily digest emailed every morning while my laptop is closed
tests.expected_output_summary: Recommends a Cloud Routine and hands off to /ren:routine-init.
binary_assertions: Output recommends a Cloud Routine (names 'Cloud Routine' or 'routine')
Output names '/ren:routine-init' as the next step
Output mentions the failure footer / Resend notification convention

tests.prompt: /ren:cadence keep checking my deploy every few minutes while I work
tests.expected_output_summary: Recommends /loop with a self-terminating stop condition.
binary_assertions: Output attaches a self-terminating stop condition (mentions stopping after N iterations or a time window)

tests.prompt: /ren:cadence run improve-skill overnight until coverage hits 80%
tests.expected_output_summary: Recommends /goal with the measurable exit criterion.
binary_assertions: Output requires a measurable exit criterion (references the 80% coverage as the done-condition)
